pos.title: POS Terminal
pos.startSession: Start a new POS session to begin
pos.posReceiptsDesc: Configure receipt printing for the Point of Sale
pos.paymentMethodsDesc: Choose which payment methods should appear in POS checkout.
pos.atLeastOnePaymentMethod: Keep at least one payment method enabled.
pos.autoPrintReceiptElectron: Automatically print receipt to thermal printer after each POS checkout (silent, no dialog)
pos.autoPrintReceiptMobile: Automatically print receipt to the saved mobile network printer after each POS checkout
pos.autoPrintReceiptWeb: Automatically open the print dialog with a thermal receipt after each POS checkout
pos.sessionReportLanguageDesc: Choose whether the thermal POS session close report prints in full English or full Arabic.
pos.sessionReportLanguageSaveFailed: Failed to save session report language
pos.thermalPrinterConfigDesc: Configure the thermal printer connected to this POS terminal
pos.mobileThermalPrinterConfigDesc: Save the LAN printer used by this Android device. Web updates continue to come from the hosted ERP.
pos.htmlDriverSpoolerDesc: Uses the current styled HTML receipt and prints it through the Windows driver/spooler. Best when the Windows printer driver is reliable.
pos.htmlRasterEscposDesc: Renders the current HTML receipt as an image and sends it as raw ESC/POS raster data. Recommended for Arabic and closer visual matching.
pos.escposTextRawDesc: Builds the receipt directly with ESC/POS text commands. Fastest option, but Arabic shaping and exact HTML styling are limited.
pos.bitmapCanvasDesc: Draws the receipt directly on a Canvas for the best Arabic text quality, then sends a native QR code command. Industry standard for Saudi POS printers.
pos.enterPrinterIp: Enter the printer IP address first
pos.noPrintersFound: No printers found. Make sure your printer is installed in Windows.
pos.noUsbPrintersFound: No raw USB printers found. Make sure the device is connected and available to libusb/WinUSB.
pos.rawUsbWarning: Raw USB mode usually requires a libusb/WinUSB driver. If the printer already uses a normal Windows print driver, prefer Windows Printer mode.
pos.windowsDriverModeRequiresWindows: HTML -> Windows Spooler mode requires Connection Type = Windows Printer.
pos.cutPaperDesc: Send a cut command after each mobile print.
pos.openDrawerAfterPrintDesc: Kick the cash drawer when the receipt finishes printing.
pos.openDrawerOnSale: Always Open Cash Drawer on Sale
pos.openDrawerOnSaleDesc: Automatically open the cash drawer on every sale, regardless of payment method or auto-print.
pos.mobilePrinterConfigSaved: Mobile printer configuration saved on this device.
pos.mobilePrinterConfigSaveFailed: Failed to save the mobile printer configuration.
pos.mobilePrinterReachable: Mobile printer is reachable on the local network.
pos.installDesktopApp: Install the BizArch Desktop App for silent thermal printing without print dialogs.
pos.desktopAppSupports: The desktop app supports network ESC/POS printers, Windows-installed printers, and optional direct raw USB printing.
pos.receiptMarginsDesc: Adjust margins to prevent content from being clipped on the right edge of the thermal receipt.
pos.arabicCodePageDesc: Used only for Raw ESC/POS Text mode. PC864 has the widest vendor support; WPC1256 can work better on some Epson/Bixolon setups.
pos.cacheCleared: Cache cleared successfully. Reload the app to see fresh content.
pos.customerMustBeSelectedForCreditSale: A customer MUST be selected for a credit sale.
pos.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search or category filter
pos.searchProductsByNameOrSku: Search products by name or SKU...
pos.enterClosingCashAmount: Enter the closing cash amount to end this session.
pos.ifNotSelectedNonCashPaymentsGoToCashAcco: If not selected, non-cash payments go to the cash account above.
pos.noClosedSessionsDesc: There are no closed sessions for this register yet.
pos.selectReturnItems: Search products and set return quantities
pos.addItemsToReturn: Scan or add items to return
pos.failedToListUsbPrinters: Failed to list raw USB printers
pos.receiptPrintingFailed: Failed to update receipt printing setting
pos.defaultSettlementSaveFailed: Failed to save default settlement accounts
pos.registerAccountsDesc: Set the store safe and bank accounts for this register. In clearing mode, the opening float is issued from the store safe and all cash returns to it at session close.
pos.failedToDownloadSessionReport: Failed to download POS session report
pos.failedToPrintSessionReport: Failed to print POS session report
pos.failedToUpdateReceiptPrinting: Failed to update receipt printing setting

admin.jewelleryHuidMandatoryDesc: Require HUID number for all jewellery items
admin.jewellerySasoMandatoryDesc: Require SASO hallmarking marks for items
admin.jewelleryAutoDerivePuritiesDesc: Automatically calculate rates for other purities from the 24K base rate

admin.cannotEnableBothGstSaudi: Cannot enable both GST and Saudi e-invoice
admin.fixBalancesDesc: Check and fix customer balance discrepancies
admin.balanceCheckerDesc: This tool will check all customer balances
admin.fixProductCostsDesc: Fix products whose cost was set to the discounted price
admin.productCostCheckerDesc: This tool checks all products with purchase history
admin.incorrectCostsDesc: These products have their cost set to the discounted price
admin.fixedProductCostsDesc: Successfully updated the following product costs to MRP
admin.fixBalancesConfirm: Are you sure you want to fix all customer balances?
admin.fixCostsConfirm: Are you sure you want to fix all product costs to MRP?
admin.deleteOrgConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization?
admin.manageSettingsDesc: Manage settings and configuration for this organization
admin.saudiZatcaDesc: ZATCA Phase 1 e-invoicing with VAT at 15% and QR codes. Disables GST.
admin.taxInclusiveFullDesc: Selling prices already include tax. The system will back-calculate the tax-exclusive base amount.
admin.posAccountingDirectDesc: Direct: POS payments go directly to Cash/Bank in real-time.
admin.posAccountingClearingDesc: Clearing Account: Payments are held in "POS Undeposited Funds" until session close.
admin.defaultCashSettlementDesc: Pre-filled when closing a POS session. Can be overridden per session.

admin.invoicePdfFormatDesc: Paper size and orientation for generated invoice PDFs
admin.transferPdfFormatDesc: Language and layout for generated stock transfer PDFs
admin.hideCostTransferPdfDesc: Hide unit cost, line total, and transfer value from the PDF — only quantity is shown
admin.pdfHeaderFooterDesc: Optional images rendered edge-to-edge at the top/bottom of each A4 invoice page
admin.companyLogoDesc: Optional logo image rendered at the top left of the invoice. For best results, use a square image.
admin.logoHeightDesc: Controls the maximum height of the logo on the invoice PDF.
admin.brandColorDesc: Customize the accent color used in the Modern PDF template (header, table header, balance banner).
admin.posReceiptLogoDesc: Logo shown on POS thermal receipts. If left blank, the invoice logo above is used as fallback.
admin.posLogoHeightDesc: Controls the maximum height of the logo on POS thermal receipts.
admin.maintenanceDesc: Tools to ensure data integrity for this organization
admin.recalculateFifoDesc: Rebuilds the entire Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) logic for all products chronologically.
admin.recalculateFifoDialogDesc: This will reprocess all inventory stock consumptions to fix COGS calculation discrepancies.
admin.noUsersFound: No users found for this organization.
admin.name: Name
admin.resetTxOnlyDesc: Permanently remove all transactions (invoices, bills, payments, journals) but keep master data.
admin.completeResetDesc: Permanently remove all data (transactions AND master data) associated with this organization.
admin.deleteOrgDesc: Permanently remove this organization and all its data.
admin.deleteOrgDialogDesc: This will permanently delete the organization and all its associated data. This action cannot be undone.
admin.resetTxDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete all transactions for this organization? Master data will be kept.
admin.actionIrreversible: This action is irreversible and should be done with caution.
admin.actionIrreversibleExtreme: This action is irreversible and should be done with extreme caution.
admin.completeResetDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to perform a complete reset? This will wipe ALL transactions and master data.
admin.setCurrencyFullDesc: Set the currency used for all transactions
